title: centaurea triumfettii subsp. aligera
intro: Centaurea triumfettii subsp. aligera, also known as wild artichoke, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea triumfettii subsp. aligera include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive problems, skin issues, and respiratory issues.
